/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fsanitize=address,undefined "CMakeFiles/tiny-renderer-objects.dir/src/camera/camera.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tiny-renderer-objects.dir/src/camera/pinhole_camera.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tiny-renderer-objects.dir/src/film/film.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tiny-renderer-objects.dir/src/math/geometry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tiny-renderer-objects.dir/src/scene/scene.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tiny-renderer-objects.dir/src/shapes/sphere.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tiny-renderer-objects.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o tiny-renderer
